news.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion from stock sales to fund AI buildout
HPE skyrockets 30% on biggest earnings beat since 2018
Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
Stock futures slip after all three major indexes close at new records
Alphabet asks shareholders to foot an $80 billion bill for AI expansion
As Micron's stock blows past $1,000, Wall Street sees more gains in store

summary: 美股隔夜三大指数收创新高后小幅回撤。S&P 500期货-0.39%，现货盘前波动。Alphabet计划筹资800亿美元用于AI建设，HPE财报亮眼暴涨30%。地缘方面特朗普称'不在乎'伊朗谈判破裂，油价温和回落。BTC跌3%至71,229美元，ETH跌0.5%。港股恒指持平报25,398。
